let sum (a: array int) (n: int) : int requires { n = length a } ensures { result = sum_func a 0 n } = let ref s = 0 in for i = 0 to n - 1 do invariant { s = sum_func a 0 i } s <- s + a[i] done; s
tactic_proof: requires { n = length a } ensures { result = sum_func a 0 n } invariant { s = sum_func a 0 i }

goal: let rec factorial (n: int) : int requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = fact n } variant { n } = if n = 0 then 1 else n * factorial (n - 1)
tactic_proof: requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = fact n } variant { n }

goal: let rec fib (n: int) : int requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = fibonacci n } variant { n } = if n <= 1 then n else fib (n - 1) + fib (n - 2)
tactic_proof: requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = fibonacci n } variant { n }

goal: let rec gcd (a b: int) : int requires { a >= 0 /\ b >= 0 } ensures { result = Gcd.gcd a b } variant { b } = if b = 0 then a else gcd b (mod a b)
tactic_proof: requires { a >= 0 /\ b >= 0 } ensures { result = Gcd.gcd a b } variant { b }

goal: let rec power (x n: int) : int requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = pow x n } variant { n } = if n = 0 then 1 else if mod n 2 = 0 then let p = power x (div n 2) in p * p else x * power x (n - 1)
tactic_proof: requires { n >= 0 } ensures { result = pow x n } variant { n }

goal: let max (a b: int) : int ensures { result >= a /\ result >= b } ensures { result = a \/ result = b } = if a >= b then a else b
tactic_proof: ensures { result >= a /\ result >= b } ensures { result = a \/ result = b }

goal: let dutch_flag (a: array color) : unit ensures { sorted_colors a } ensures { permut_all (old a) a } = let ref r = 0 in let ref w = 0 in let ref b = length a - 1 in while w <= b do invariant { ... } variant { b - w + 1 } ... done
tactic_proof: ensures { sorted_colors result } ensures { permut_all (old a) a } invariant { ... } variant { b - w + 1 }

goal: let push (rb: ring_buffer 'a) (x: 'a) : unit requires { not is_full rb } ensures { length rb = old (length rb) + 1 }

goal: let pop (rb: ring_buffer 'a) : 'a requires { not is_empty rb } ensures { length rb = old (length rb) - 1 }
tactic_proof: requires { not is_empty rb } ensures { length rb = old (length rb) - 1 }
